mission.title: knative: Use TLS for websocket and gRPC tests
mission.description:
Use TLS for websocket and gRPC tests

Current gRPC and Websocket does not use TLS, but still uses HTTP even
when it runs with HTTPS mode.

This patch fixes it.

FIx https://github.com/knative/serving/issues/11386

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
